issue_summary: Throw IllegalArgumentException if a loop in the causal chain is detected in Throwables.getCausalChain() and Throwables.getRootCause().
javadoc_before:
/** * Gets a {@code Throwable} cause chain as a list. The first entry in the list will be {@code * throwable} followed by its cause hierarchy. Note that this is a snapshot of the cause chain and * will not reflect any subsequent changes to the cause chain. * *

Here's an example of how it can be used to find specific types of exceptions in the cause * chain: * * 

   * Iterables.filter(Throwables.getCausalChain(e), IOException.class));
   *
* * @param throwable the non-null {@code Throwable} to extract causes from * @return an unmodifiable list containing the cause chain starting with {@code throwable} */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets a {@code Throwable} cause chain as a list. The first entry in the list will be {@code * throwable} followed by its cause hierarchy. Note that this is a snapshot of the cause chain and * will not reflect any subsequent changes to the cause chain. * *

Here's an example of how it can be used to find specific types of exceptions in the cause * chain: * * 

   * Iterables.filter(Throwables.getCausalChain(e), IOException.class));
   *
* * @param throwable the non-null {@code Throwable} to extract causes from * @return an unmodifiable list containing the cause chain starting with {@code throwable} * @throws IllegalArgumentException if there is a loop in the causal chain */
